situational_context: Running comeback week 5: 7 formal runs completed (plus 1 commute run). 5 km palier validated twice (Run #5 on May 23, Run #7 on June 3). HRV in 3-day transient decline (scores 28→31→33, UNBALANCED→LOW) — consistent with post-Run #7 recovery wave compounded by one poor sleep night (6.1h on June 5). RHR briefly spiked to 52 (June 4-5), now normalizing at 49. VO2max running improved 38.3→39.9. Chronic load declined to 15.53 (from 22.3 on May 14) as higher April cycling loads rolled off the 28d window — not a training regression, a base-rate correction. Weight trending down: 102.97 kg (from 104.1 on May 14). Training readiness LOW (36). Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on sur site days. Baby (Léonie, ~17 months) likely contributing to occasional sleep disruption. Current phase: final consolidation at 5 km before progression to 5.5-6 km. Gravel ride today reduced 50→40 min due to borderline HRV.

recommendations.text: Execute today's gravel at Z1-Z2 (not Z2) for 40 min max, then reassess HRV Sunday morning before Run #8. If HRV remains <30 Sunday, downgrade to 3 km easy jog or walk. The 3-day HRV dip is a recovery wave, not overtraining, but pushing through borderline readiness risks extending it.
recommendations.measurable: Gravel completed at suffer score ≤14; Run #8 decision made based on Sunday HRV reading

recommendations.text: Run #8 target: HR avg ≤137 bpm. Run #7 showed cardiac drift (FC 140 avg, max 161 vs Run #5's 136/153). If Run #8 also shows FC >140 at the same pace, this signals accumulated fatigue — extend the 5 km consolidation phase by 1-2 additional runs before progressing to 5.5 km.
recommendations.measurable: Run #8 average HR ≤137 bpm at ≤7:30/km pace

recommendations.text: Address protein under-target: 7-day avg protein ~126g vs 150g target. At 103 kg during a body recomposition phase with running comeback, adequate protein (1.4-1.6 g/kg = 144-165g) is critical for tendon adaptation and muscle preservation. Add one protein-rich snack daily.
recommendations.measurable: ≥140g protein on ≥5 of 7 days this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 30 for 2+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 34, with acute dip to 28-33 over last 3 days. Recovery expected within 48-72h. Persistent drop below 30 would indicate cumulative overload.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if RHR rises >5 bpm above 49 bpm baseline for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Brief spike to 52 (June 4-5) resolved to 49 (June 6). Stable for now.

markers_to_watch.threshold: FC avg >140 bpm on Run #8 at same pace as Run #5
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #7 showed cardiac drift vs Run #5 (140 vs 136 avg). If Run #8 confirms this pattern, fatigue accumulation is limiting performance.
Dropped from 22.3 to 15.53 in 23 days as April cycling loads aged out. Should stabilize and begin climbing as running volume accumulates.
